---
title: 'Moving On Up'
date: '2014-01-19T15:23:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4598796679417172995'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/moving-on-up.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

I have decided to blog under my own name. For that reason my blog has a new address. Please visit:<br /><br />www.darrellwolfe.com to find the continuation of this work, and other works by me. Thank you for your interest.<br /><br /><h4 style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">www.darrellwolfe.com</a></h4><br /><br /><h2 style="background-color: white; border-bottom-color: transparent; border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-width: 1px; font-family: 'Walter Turncoat'; font-size: 14px; margin: 0px -15px; padding: 0.6em 15px 0.5em; position: relative; text-align: center;">Darrell G. Wolfe The Blog</h2><h3 style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; margin: 0px; position: relative; text-align: center;">Eradicating Debt, Experiencing the Supernatural, Exploring Good Success</h3><div style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px;"><h4 style="color: #286299; font-family: 'Walter Turncoat'; font-size: 22px; line-height: normal; margin: 0px; position: relative;">Who are you?</h4><br /><ul style="line-height: 1.4; list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;"><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">You are someone who is:</li><ul style="line-height: 1.4; list-style: disc; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;"><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Tired of debt.</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Discontent with&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nas/1-samuel/22-2.html" style="color: #397dbf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">religion</a>&nbsp;as-we-know-it</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Done feeling the stress and pressures of being merely natural.&nbsp;</li></ul><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">You want to find:</li><ul style="line-height: 1.4; list-style: disc; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;"><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Lasting&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nas/deuteronomy/8-18.html" style="color: #397dbf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Prosperity</a>!</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">The&nbsp;<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nas/1-corinthians/passage.aspx?q=1-corinthians+3:1-8" style="color: #397dbf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Supernatural</a>!&nbsp;</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;"><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nas/joshua/1-8.html" style="color: #397dbf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Good Success</a>!</li></ul></ul></div><div style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px;"><h4 style="color: #286299; font-family: 'Walter Turncoat'; font-size: 22px; line-height: normal; margin: 0px; position: relative;">What can you expect?</h4></div><div style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px;"><ul style="line-height: 1.4; list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;"><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">I will be posting here at least once a week.&nbsp;</li><ul style="line-height: 1.4; list-style: disc; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;"><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Each post will be scheduled on Mondays.&nbsp;</li></ul><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">I will put out special posts periodically.&nbsp;</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">I will send some Twitter posts to the blog when I feel it could help you.&nbsp;</li></ul><div><br /></div></div><ul style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px; list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;"></ul><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #286299; font-family: 'Walter Turncoat'; font-size: 22px; margin: 0px; position: relative;"><b>Labels:</b></h4><div style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px;">&nbsp;My aim is to bring my own focus, for the benefit of you my reader, and so I will post to the following categories:</div><div style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px;"><ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;"><b>Spiritual Growth</b></li><ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">Things that will feed your spirit, including studies in the Word of God. &nbsp;</li></ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;"><b>Leadership</b></li><ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">Things that will help you become the leader you were always meant to be.</li></ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;"><b>Keys To Success&nbsp;</b></li><ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">Things that will help you succeed in the world marketplace. These could be concepts, ideas, professional growth tips, etc.&nbsp;</li></ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;"><b>Financial Excellence&nbsp;</b></li><ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">Things that will help you succeed in the area of finances.</li></ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;"><b>Technology &amp; Tools&nbsp;</b></li><ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">As a geek I'm always looking for new tools or toys. I tend to do things the hard way, try three new things and then pick the one I like. I'll share reviews that I think will help you as a reader narrow things down much faster if you are just looking to jump to the right thing.&nbsp;</li></ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;"><b>News &amp; Events&nbsp;</b></li><ol><li style="margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0px;">My personal commentary and perspective on recent news and events, either common news, local news, or news and events in my personal life.</li></ol></ol></div><div style="background-color: white; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Trebuchet, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px;"><h4 style="color: #286299; font-family: 'Walter Turncoat'; font-size: 22px; line-height: normal; margin: 0px; position: relative;">Who am I?</h4><br /><div style="text-align: center;"><b>My name is Darrell G. Wolfe.&nbsp;</b></div><div style="text-align: center;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: center;"><b><br /></b></div><br /><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-hat-disney-2013-round-icon-on-black-6c792f7f1546.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="color: #397dbf; margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-decoration: none;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-hat-disney-2013-round-icon-on-black-6c792f7f1546.jpg" style="-webkit-box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 0px 0px; background-color: transparent; background-position: initial initial; background-repeat: initial initial; border-bottom-left-radius: 0px; border-bottom-right-radius: 0px; border-top-left-radius: 0px; border-top-right-radius: 0px; border: 1px solid transparent; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 0px 0px; padding: 8px; position: relative;" /></a></div><ul style="line-height: 1.4; list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;"><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">I am a Child of my Father, Friend of Brother, Student of my Teacher.</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Husband, Father, Uncle, Son, and Friend</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Creative Writer</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Audio Mixer Musician</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Blogger and Author</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Professional trades have included...</li><ul style="line-height: 1.4; list-style: disc; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;"><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Banker</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Restaurant Server</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Tire Installer</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Cowboy Hat Shaper</li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;">Other...</li></ul></ul><ul style="line-height: 1.4; list-style-image: initial; list-style-position: initial; margin: 0.5em 0px; padding: 0px 2.5em;"><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;"><a href="http://www.linkedin.com/in/darrellgwolfe/" style="color: #397dbf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">My Bio&nbsp;and Resume</a></li><li style="border: none; margin: 0px 0px 0.25em; padding: 0.25em 0px;"><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/2013/11/connect.html" style="color: #397dbf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Connect</a></li></ul></div>
